---
title: "Certificate of Competency"
subtitle: "Medical Data Science Curriculum"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 12pt
    colorlinks: true
params:
  recipient: "Recipient Name"
  tier: "Basic"  # Basic, Intermediate, or Advanced
  cohort: "01"
  curriculum_version: "v0.5.0"
  certificate_id: "MDS-YYYY-XXXX"
  issued_date: "2026-06-15"
  signatory_1: "Prof. Dr. dr. Tjokorda Gde Agung Senapathi, SpAn-TI, Subsp.A.R (K)"
  signatory_1_title: "Koordinator Program Studi"
  signatory_2: "dr. I Made Agus Kresna Sucandra, SpAn-TI, Subsp.T.I (K)"
  signatory_2_title: "Kepala Divisi Data Science dan Artificial Intelligence"
---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2in;"}

![Program Logo](assets/logo.png){width=2in}

# Certificate of Competency

## Medical Data Science Curriculum

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1in;"}

This certifies that

**`r params$recipient`**

has successfully completed the

**`r params$tier` Tier**

of the Medical Data Science Curriculum

(Cohort `r params$cohort`, Version `r params$curriculum_version`)

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5in;"}

**Issued:** `r params$issued_date`

**Certificate ID:** `r params$certificate_id`

Verify at: `https://balinesthesia.github.io/mds-curriculum/verify?id=`r params$certificate_id`

:::

::: {style="margin-top: 2in;"}

::: {style="float: left; width: 45%; text-align: center;"}

![Signature 1](assets/signature-1.png){width=2in}

`r params$signatory_1`  
`r params$signatory_1_title`

:::

::: {style="float: right; width: 45%; text-align: center;"}

![Signature 2](assets/signature-2.png){width=2in}

`r params$signatory_2`  
`r params$signatory_2_title`

:::

:::

::: {style="clear: both; text-align: center; margin-top: 3in; font-size: 10pt;"}

**Division of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence**  
Study Program of Anesthesiology and Intensive Therapy  
Faculty of Medicine, Universitas Udayana

:::
